description: Inviton is an event management and ticketing platform for organizers to sell tickets, manage registrations, schedule conference programs, and handle on-site check-in and attendee operations. It also offers embeddable widgets so organizers can publish ticket sales and event data on their own websites.
summary: Inviton exposes a public clientside JavaScript widget API for embedding ticket sales and event/registration widgets; no authenticated developer REST, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found on inviton.eu.
